basic_details.job_title: JNCASR Academic ERP Solution Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) Academic ERP Solution Manager Notification 2026 has been released on 07 May 2026 on the official website of Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the JNCASR Academic ERP Solution Manager Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/BTech/ME/MTech/MS in Computer Science/IT related areas with 55% marks, 5-10 years experience in ERP implementation preferably in academic institutions
qualification.details: BE/BTech/ME/MTech/MS in Computer Science, IT related areas with 55% marks from a recognized University/Institute. Minimum 5 years of experience in ERP implementation (preferably in academic institutions) for ME/MTech/MS. Minimum 8-10 years for BE/BTech.

selection_process: Shortlisting Further selection process (details to be communicated to shortlisted candidates)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JNCASR Academic ERP Solution Manager Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JNCASR Academic ERP Solution Manager position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Academic ERP Solution Manager post at JNCASR is 21st May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a BE/BTech/ME/MTech/MS in Computer Science or IT related areas with at least 55% marks from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. How many years of experience are needed for the Academic ERP Solution Manager role?
faq.answer: For ME/MTech/MS holders, a minimum of 5 years of experience in ERP implementation is required. For BE/BTech holders, 8-10 years of experience is necessary.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Academic ERP Solution Manager position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 40 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Academic ERP Solution Manager post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 75,000 to Rs. 1,20,000.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the JNCASR Academic ERP Solution Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications should be sent via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Academic ERP Solution Manager role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of applications, followed by further selection procedures which will be communicated to the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What documents do I need to attach with my application?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will provide all detailed information.
